edges.detail: No fence or dependency preserves the W->W program-order edge.
External communication edge is always part of global order.
Address dependency from the load preserves order to the dependent access.
External communication edge is always part of global order.

reason: Cycle is broken: program-order edge(s) p0_wx->p0_wy are not preserved by RVWMO PPO. (PBMT=NC is non-cacheable main memory and obeys RVWMO per Svpbmt, so this verdict equals the cacheable twin; the plain body lets herd7 cross-check it.) (herd7 not on PATH; no cross-check performed.)
